results.explanation: K2 Disruption 78C strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: stiffness. Review: "Lightweight, not tiring" Review: "Soft enough to be friendly"

Elan Ripstick 96 strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: stiffness. Review: "At 96mm they're right in the sweet spot" Review: "carbon Amphibio construction is unique — different flex on each edge for easier turn initiation" Review: "Decent playfulness and edge grip"

Rossignol Experience 78 Ca strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: stiffness. Review: "Soft flex makes it easy to control at slow speeds." Review: "forgiving flex pattern" Review: "Light enough that my legs don't get tired."

Line Blade strongly matches on: playfulness. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stiff flex, stable at speed" Review: "Not explicitly stated as stiffness but related to edge feel." Review: "Slightly more playful than other expert carvers which I love."
Moderate match on: stiffness, playfulness. Review: "Playfulness is moderate"

Moderate match on: playfulness. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stiff enough for experts but not punishing" Review: "impressive stiffness for all-mountain ski" Review: "good playfulness for an all-mountain ski"
Moderate match on: playfulness. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stable at speed, doesn't wander."

Moderate match on: playfulness. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stiff enough for aggressive skiing" Review: "Good stability, stiff flex." Review: "not quite as damp as the Supershape but more lively feeling"

Moderate match on: playfulness. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "incredible stiffness and power" Review: "Stiff enough for aggressive skiing but not quite race-level demanding" Review: "connected to the snow but protected from chatter"
Weak match on: stiffness, playfulness. Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "Stiff and damp from the titanal construction" Review: "Not playful, very precise"

ground_truth.reason: True beginner ski, softest flex (2), max forgiveness (10)
Soft flex (5) and forgiving (6), though freestyle-oriented
